## Project Information

**⭐ Approximate GitHub Stars:**
<!-- e.g., ~1.2k -->

## Category

Please select the most appropriate category:

- [ ] 🔬 End-to-End Autonomous Research System (full lifecycle: idea → experiment → paper)
- [ ] 📚 Deep Research & Literature Synthesis
- [ ] ⚙️ Automated Experiment & Code Agent
- [ ] 💡 Idea Generation & Paper Writing Assistant
- [ ] 📊 Benchmark / Evaluation Suite
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Detailed Report

- [ ] I plan to also submit a detailed analysis report in `reports/<project-slug>.md`
- [ ] I am only suggesting the project for the main list

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that this project is not already listed in the README
- [ ] The GitHub repository link is valid and publicly accessible
- [ ] The description is accurate and free of promotional language
